evals.prompt: I'm getting 502 Bad Gateway error from nginx, how to fix?
evals.expected_output: Should follow 502 diagnostic: check error log, test backend, check upstream status

evals.prompt: nginx shows 403 Forbidden when accessing files
evals.expected_output: Should check permissions, index files, SELinux context

evals.prompt: nginx won't start, config test fails
evals.expected_output: Should run nginx -t, check for port conflicts, syntax errors

evals.prompt: php-fpm not working with nginx, getting blank page
evals.expected_output: Should check PHP-FPM status, socket permissions, fastcgi_pass config

evals.prompt: SSL certificate expired, how to renew?
evals.expected_output: Should suggest certbot renew, check renewal dates
